creator: tech-lists@zyxst.net
text:
(In reply to Tijl Coosemans from comment #27)

Ok, that worked (with patch).

When Libreoffice starts, it occupies about 90% of the screen, and there's garbled output occupying about 10% of the libreoffice window. Re-sizing the screen normalises the window. Direct conversion to PDF works (using the icon at the top of the writer window).

Here is output of help:

Version: 6.4.4.2
Build ID: FreeBSD ports 6.4.4
CPU threads: 8; OS: FreeBSD 12.1; UI render: default; VCL: qt5+cairo; 
Locale: en-GB (en_GB.UTF-8); UI-Language: en-GB
Calc: threaded
